description:
🕒 14:00–16:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-chokotto-tenranzan-syoka/

Walk with a guide and discover the natural changes you might otherwise miss on an ordinary walk. This is an easy short tour you can enjoy in a brief time. Please feel free to join. Depending on the season, homemade organic vegetables may be given as a gift!

【Fee】1 person ¥2,000; returning visitor ¥1,500; one family ¥4,000 (includes guide fee and insurance)

【Capacity】10 people

【Guide】Tsubasa Kojima (Hanno City Eco-Tourism Citizen Guide Association, Wildlife Section)

【What to bring】Drinking water, rain gear, backpack or similar (something that leaves both hands free is recommended), towel
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館」下車徒歩3分）
